3032080.name: Sound Horizons
3032080.description:
Sound Horizons is a minimalist yet challenging rhythm game where you make one with music. Its generative soundtrack changes along your progression and reshape the world as you play. The melodies are always random, your only option to adapt is by getting in the rhythm. Succeeds enough, and you might see the end of your journey.

  • Intuitive controls with four buttons, offering a quick learning curve so that you can test your rhythm skills

  • Interactive music: every button press adds new notes to the melody

  • A Procedural landscape that moves to the beat, for a true synesthetic experience

  • An Adaptive difficulty ensures that the challenge is always aligned to your skill, so that you can progress at your own pace

  • Additional modes for more challenges and immersive musical experiences

Sound Horizons contains 2 levels as of today. I might work on new ones in the future, if there is demand for it.
